name: Cucumber Salad with Mint
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons creme fraiche (you may need more)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and halve the cucumbers.
2. Remove seeds and thinly slice the cucumber halves.
3. Place the sliced cucumbers in a bowl and sprinkle with salt. Mix well.
4. Refrigerate for 2 1/2 hours to allow the cucumbers to cool and release excess moisture.
5. In a separate 1-quart bowl, whisk together creme fraiche and Dijon mustard.
6. Add lemon juice gradually, tasting as needed.
7. Whisk until thick and creamy, then stir in chopped mint leaves and black pepper.
8. After 2 1/2 hours, rinse the cucumbers well under cold water to remove excess salt.
9. Drain the cucumbers in a sieve and pat dry with a towel.
10. Mix the cucumbers with the dressing and serve chilled.
